title: dendropemon alatus
intro: Dendropemon alatus, also known as the winged climbing fig, is a species of flowering plant in the family Moraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Dendropemon alatus include its potential to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and support digestive health. Dendropemon alatus is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can be consumed as a herbal tea or used topically in the form of a paste or ointment.
